description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a vibrant red body and black detailing, featuring a prominent front fender and a large, rounded headlamp. The frame is constructed from metal tubing, with visible engine components and exhaust pipes running along the side. The seat is a single, brown leather saddle, positioned above a robust rear fender and flanked by a pair of large, spoked wheels. The handlebars are tall and slightly curved, equipped with rearview mirrors and hand controls. The motorcycle displays the 'Indian' brand logo on the fuel tank, indicating its heritage design. A license plate is mounted on the rear fender, and the overall build suggests a heavy, durable construction suitable for urban and road environments.
description: A vintage red Indian motorcycle with a brown leather seat, large spoked wheels, and classic metal detailing. Features include a prominent headlamp, tall handlebars, and a rear license plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large headlamp, front fender, and tall handlebars with mirrors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'Indian' logo on the tank, brown leather seat, and visible engine and exhaust pipes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, rear fender, and the back of the seat and handlebars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the motorcycle, including the rear light and exhaust system.
